data.title: Great Pacific Gold Reports Significant Drilling Results at Wild Dog Project
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Fosterville South Exploration ( (TSE:GPAC) ) is now available.

Great Pacific Gold Corp. has announced promising results from its Phase 1 drilling program at the Wild Dog Project in Papua New Guinea. The latest drill holes have revealed significant gold and copper mineralization, extending the known mineralized system both north and south. These findings underscore the project’s potential and suggest an expansion of the drilling program, which could enhance the company’s position in the mining industry and impact stakeholders positively.

More about Fosterville South Exploration

Great Pacific Gold Corp. is a mining exploration company focused on discovering and developing gold and copper resources. The company is actively engaged in exploration activities in Papua New Guinea, targeting high-priority mineralized zones.

Tethys Petroleum ( (TSE:TPL) ) has shared an update.

Tethys Petroleum has announced the intention of Fincraft Group LLP and Gazexport Limited to nominate new directors at the upcoming annual general meeting. The nominations include Askar Ismailov by Fincraft and Paul J. Ostling and Piers Johnson by Gazexport. The management of Tethys has not independently reviewed the credentials of these nominees, and their consideration will be addressed at the shareholders meeting.

data.title: Canaccord Genuity Reports Strong Shareholder Support at AGM
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from Canaccord Genuity ( (TSE:CF) ).

Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. announced the results of its annual general meeting, where shareholders approved the appointment of Ernst & Young LLP as auditors, set the number of directors at five, and accepted the executive compensation approach. Additionally, the election of directors proposed by management was overwhelmingly supported, indicating strong shareholder confidence in the current leadership and strategic direction. These decisions are significant for the company’s governance and operational stability, reinforcing its position in the financial services industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CF) stock is a Buy with a C$13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canaccord Genuity stock, see the TSE:CF Stock Forecast page.

The overall stock score of 58 reflects mixed financial performance with recent improvements in revenue and cash flow, but ongoing profitability challenges. Technical indicators are bearish, and valuation is impacted by a negative P/E ratio. The earnings call provided positive insights into revenue growth and expansion, but elevated expenses and increased debt remain concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CF stock, click here.

More about Canaccord Genuity

Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. is a leading independent, full-service financial services firm operating in wealth management and capital markets. Established in 1950, the company offers investment solutions, brokerage, and investment banking services to individual, institutional, and corporate clients. It has wealth management offices in Canada, the UK, Guernsey, Jersey, the Isle of Man, and Australia, and its international capital markets division operates across North America, UK & Europe, Asia, and Australia. The company is publicly traded on the TSX under the symbol CF.

data.title: Aether Global Innovations Announces Share Consolidation Effective August 12, 2025
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Plymouth Rock Technologies Inc ( (TSE:AETH) ) has shared an announcement.

On August 8, 2025, Aether Global Innovations Corp. announced a share consolidation effective August 12, 2025, where one post-consolidated share will replace every ten pre-consolidated shares. This move aims to streamline the company’s share structure, with the post-consolidation shares expected to begin trading on the Canadian Securities Exchange on the effective date. The consolidation will not affect the company’s name or trading symbol, and shareholders will need to exchange their pre-consolidation share certificates for new ones. This strategic decision is likely to impact the company’s market positioning and shareholder value.

More about Plymouth Rock Technologies Inc

Aether Global Innovations Corp. is a pioneering company in the UAV and drone management sector, specializing in drone management and surveillance monitoring, automation and integration for flight planning, and drone base station infrastructure. The company targets critical infrastructure and large public and private facilities, providing innovative solutions for autonomous drone operations.

Average Trading Volume: 70,078

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$3.12M

See more insights into AETH stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Loma Negra Reports Q2 2025 Earnings Amid Challenging Market Conditions
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Loma Negra Compania Industrial Argentina Sociedad Anonima ( (LOMA) ) has issued an announcement.

In its recent earnings release for the second quarter of 2025, Loma Negra reported a challenging market environment with an 8% decline in net revenues to Ps. 174.5 billion and a 30.6% drop in adjusted EBITDA to Ps. 37.0 billion. Despite a recovery in cement dispatches, which grew 11% year-over-year, the company faced margin contractions across most segments, except for the railroad segment. The company successfully issued a US$112.9 million bond in July to refinance short-term debt, maintaining a solid balance sheet with a net debt of US$215 million.

The most recent analyst rating on (LOMA) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Loma Negra Compania Industrial Argentina Sociedad Anonima stock, see the LOMA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LOMA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LOMA is a Neutral.

Loma Negra’s overall stock score is driven primarily by its solid financial performance, characterized by strong profitability and cash management. The stock’s fair valuation supports a positive outlook, though technical analysis indicates potential bearish trends. The absence of dividend yield and mixed technical signals slightly offset the company’s financial strengths.

To see Spark’s full report on LOMA stock, click here.

More about Loma Negra Compania Industrial Argentina Sociedad Anonima

Loma Negra Compañía Industrial Argentina Sociedad Anónima is a leading company in the cement industry, primarily engaged in the production and distribution of cement, masonry, lime, concrete, and aggregates. The company operates mainly in Argentina and is a significant player in the construction materials market.

data.title: NatWest Group Executes Share Buyback on August 8, 2025
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

NatWest Group ( (NWG) ) has issued an announcement.

On August 8, 2025, NatWest Group plc announced the purchase of 1,931,618 of its own ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback program. The shares were bought from Merrill Lynch International at prices ranging from 514.60 GBp to 521.60 GBp, with a volume-weighted average price of 518.64 GBp. This transaction follows instructions issued by the company on July 25, 2025, and announced on July 28, 2025. The repurchased shares are intended to be canceled, which will affect the company’s share capital structure by increasing the number of shares held in treasury to 231,259,394.

Spark’s Take on NWG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NWG is a Outperform.

NatWest Group’s strong financial performance and positive earnings call are the primary drivers of its solid overall score. The attractive valuation also supports the score, while technical indicators reflect a stable market view.

To see Spark’s full report on NWG stock, click here.

More about NatWest Group

NatWest Group plc is a major banking and financial services company based in the United Kingdom. It offers a wide range of financial products and services, including personal and business banking, wealth management, and insurance. The company primarily focuses on serving customers in the UK and Ireland.
